texts.content:
Sunrise Diner – Breakfast Menu

Farmhouse Omelette – three eggs, cheddar, bell peppers, onions, served with toast … $11.50
Blueberry Pancakes – stack of three, real maple syrup, whipped butter … $9.75
Avocado Toast – sourdough, smashed avocado, cherry tomatoes, poached egg … $10.25

All breakfast plates include your choice of coffee or orange juice.

Add a side of bacon or sausage for $3.00.

questions.stem: What is included with every breakfast plate?
options: A. A side of bacon
B. A choice of coffee or orange juice
C. Real maple syrup
D. Sourdough bread
questions.explanation: The menu says 'All breakfast plates include your choice of coffee or orange juice.'

questions.stem: How much would the Avocado Toast cost with an added side of bacon?
questions.explanation: Avocado Toast is $10.25 and a side of bacon costs $3.00, totaling $13.25.

texts.content:
ATTENTION

This area is under 24-hour video surveillance.

Parking for residents only.
Violators will be towed at owner's expense.

Visitor parking available in Lot B (blue signs).

questions.stem: What is the primary message of this sign?
options: A. To advertise visitor parking rates
B. To warn non-residents against parking
C. To announce new security cameras
D. To inform about a lost vehicle policy
questions.explanation: The sign warns that parking is for residents only and violators will be towed.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about Lot B?
options: A. It charges higher fees than resident parking
B. It is intended for people who do not live in the building
C. It is located underground
D. It is reserved for building staff
questions.explanation: Visitor parking is explicitly separated from resident parking, suggesting Lot B is for non-residents.

texts.content:
BookReviewer42 ★★★★☆

I picked up "The Silent Garden" on a whim and I'm glad I did. The writing is atmospheric and the characters feel genuine, though the middle section drags a bit. If you enjoy slow-burn literary fiction with vivid nature descriptions, this one's for you. Not for readers who need fast-paced action.

questions.stem: What criticism does the reviewer have about the book?
options: A. The characters are poorly developed
B. The writing style is confusing
C. The middle part lacks momentum
D. The ending is unsatisfying
questions.explanation: The reviewer says 'the middle section drags a bit,' indicating a pacing issue.
